question: Identify the root cause of the network fault: which device, what changed, and why it breaks.
description:
R6 removes `segment-routing mpls` from its IS-IS IPv4 address-family.
R6 stops advertising any SR labels in its LSPs and stops accepting
remote prefix-SIDs into its MPLS forwarding table. SR-MPLS labels for
every prefix through R6 disappear; R6 falls back to plain IP forwarding
via IS-IS. Crucially, the backup TI-LFA path R2→R6→R7→R4 was MPLS-
encapsulated end-to-end — losing SR on R6 breaks the FRR backup.
expected_rca:
Root cause: on 100.64.0.106 (R6), segment-routing mpls was removed from the IS-IS IPv4 address-family (and R6's Loopback0 prefix-sid removed).
Because R6 no longer advertises SR labels in its LSPs and no longer installs remote prefix-SIDs, it falls back to plain IP forwarding; the IS-IS data plane on R6 carries no MPLS labels. Critically, the TI-LFA backup path R2->R6->R7->R4 relied on end-to-end SR-MPLS encapsulation, so with R6's SR capability gone that backup is no longer usable and FRR loses its end-to-end backup for those prefixes.
Fix: restore segment-routing mpls under R6's IS-IS IPv4 AF and re-add the Loopback0 prefix-sid index 6.
expected_symptoms_summary:
No fault syslog observed after apply — silent scenario; removing
SR-MPLS from the IS-IS AF is a quiet config event (IS-IS adjacencies
stay Up). Diagnostic ground truth lives in expected_state_diffs.
expected_state_diffs: R6 `show running-config router isis LAB address-family ipv4 unicast`: no `segment-routing mpls` line (baseline: present). Diff vs every other router — R6 is the only one without it.
R6 `show running-config router isis LAB interface Loopback0`: no `prefix-sid index 6` line (was removed as a dependency before segment-routing-mpls removal).
R3 `show isis database verbose` for R6's LSPID: R6's LSP no longer carries SR-Capabilities or Prefix-SID sub-TLVs.
R2 `show mpls forwarding`: label entries that previously routed via R6 are now unlabeled — plain IP forwarding through R6 only.

R2 `show isis fast-reroute detail`: backup for primary R2-R3-R4 fails with 'no SR capability on neighbor R6' or similar; the MPLS-encapsulated TI-LFA backup path R2→R6→R7→R4 is no longer usable. `show isis fast-reroute summary` reports reduced backup coverage.

apply.commands:
configure terminal
router isis LAB
 interface Loopback0
  address-family ipv4 unicast
   no prefix-sid index 6

configure terminal
router isis LAB
 address-family ipv4 unicast
  no segment-routing mpls

revert.commands:
configure terminal
router isis LAB
 address-family ipv4 unicast
  segment-routing mpls

configure terminal
router isis LAB
 interface Loopback0
  address-family ipv4 unicast
   prefix-sid index 6
